# SkyGuard AI

> AI-powered real-time airspace monitoring with ML threat detection, trajectory prediction, and agentic intelligence.

SkyGuard AI is an airspace intelligence platform providing real-time flight tracking, ML-based anomaly detection, drone identification, and AI-powered threat analysis.

## Key Features

- Real-time flight tracking with radar data from OpenSky Network
- ML-based anomaly detection for airspace threats (XGBoost + Isolation Forest)
- Drone and UAV identification
- AI-powered threat analysis via Groq (Llama 3)
- Trajectory prediction visualization
- Interactive map with deck.gl and MapLibre GL JS
- Weather alerts and day/night overlay
- No-fly zone monitoring and DGCA compliance

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: TypeScript, Vite, MapLibre GL JS, deck.gl, D3.js
- **Backend**: FastAPI (Python), ML models (scikit-learn, XGBoost, Isolation Forest)
- **AI**: Groq (Llama 3), agentic threat analysis copilot

## API Endpoints

- GET /api/radar/stream - Real-time radar data firehose with ML classification
- POST /api/agent/copilot - Agentic AI threat analysis via Llama 3
